posts.author: MaraJenkins92
posts.text: Hey everyone! Quick update on my listings. I've just received a message from 'QuickPost Support' claiming my account is locked and needs immediate verification to unlock your payments. They are asking me to DM them my 2FA code and card details to prove it's me before releasing funds. Is this normal? Please don't click the link in their bio! #accounthelp
posts.explanation: The post solicits sensitive authentication codes and financial details under the guise of account verification, which constitutes a social-engineering fraud attempt requiring specialist review.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
